{{Quote|Well, I'll be—! They're still hanging here… just the way I left 'em. The dice I won her with...|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="SW81" />}}
'''Han's dice''' were a pair of [[Gold/Legends|gold]] [[Chance cube/Legends|dice]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==History==
[[File:Chewbacca_dice.jpg|thumb|left|230px|[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] watches Han's dice aboard the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]]]
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] won the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] with those [[Chance cube/Legends|dice]].<ref name="SW81" /> He kept them as a [[luck]]y charm and hung them in the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] of the ''Millennium Falcon''.<ref name="CCG" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Solo inspected the ''Millennium Falcon'' to reacquaint himself with his [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. During his inspection, he found the dice still hanging in the cockpit, just the way he left them.<ref name="SW81" />

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
These dice only appear in one scene of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="Episode IV" /> They are not seen again in the rest of the [[original trilogy]].<ref name="Episode V">{{Film|V}}</ref><ref name="Episode VI">{{Film|VI}}</ref>
